title.rendered: AMI and Siemens Celebrate Legacy of Partnership and Collaboration to Enhance Technology Advancements

content.rendered:
ATLANTA, GEORGIA and NUREMBERG, GERMANY: AMI®, the global leader in Dynamic Firmware for worldwide computing, and Siemens, the eminent multinational industrial manufacturer, celebrate their enduring legacy of partnership and collaboration during Smart Production Solutions (SPS) Expo, taking place from November 25-27 at the Nuremberg Messe in Nuremberg, Germany. This longstanding collaboration has remained successful by leveraging AMI’s extensive embedded firmware expertise to help Siemens deliver premier industrial automation and healthcare products and solutions.  

As an acknowledged authority in embedded firmware for decades, AMI’s innovative solutions have revolutionized numerous industries. By integrating AMI technologies into Siemens’ solutions, this partnership aims to enable groundbreaking advancements in fields such as industrial automation and healthcare technologies. 

This partnership endures as a synthesis of Siemens’ unparalleled hardware engineering and AMI’s unrelenting commitment to creating adaptable, secure and efficient firmware solutions. Spanning across various industries such as automating factories, optimizing supply chains, or even enhancing healthcare solutions, this collaboration has helped accelerate the evolution of a more interconnected, automated, and digitized world.  

“AMI has always thrived by developing robust and adaptable firmware solutions that continually adapt to the dynamic needs of the world,” said Sanjoy Maity, AMI CEO. “Collaborating with Siemens, a name synonymous with industrial and healthcare innovation, gives us the opportunity to impact more sectors and reach larger audiences.” 

For Siemens, the benefits of this partnership are equally significant. “The expertise that AMI brings to the table has consistently enhanced our ability to constantly innovate, design, and implement the most advanced industrial computing platform” said Gautier Jehl. 

As these two leaders of their respective fields work together, this partnership has ushered both Siemens and AMI into new vistas of innovation and technological superiority – driving faster and more reliable digital transformations. The partnership represents both companies’ steadfast commitment to revolutionizing industry standards, promoting seamless connectivity, and delivering solutions beneficial to their customers by fostering operational efficiency and safety.   

Looking to the future, AMI and Siemens remain committed to strengthening their partnership and delivering even more innovative embedded solutions to meet the evolving needs of their global customer base. 

During SPS Expo in Nuremberg, please visit AMI in Booth 6-223 to learn more about this enduring partnership and the latest AMI innovations for industrial automation, edge computing and much more. 

About Siemens
Siemens AG is a German multinational conglomerate company and the largest industrial manufacturing company in Europe with branch offices abroad. Siemens is a pioneer in infrastructure and energy solutions, industrial automation, and medical diagnostics.  

About AMI 
AMI is Firmware Reimagined for modern computing. As a global leader in Dynamic Firmware for security, orchestration, and manageability solutions, AMI enables the world’s compute platforms from on-premises to the cloud to the edge. AMI’s industry-leading foundational technology and unwavering customer support have generated lasting partnerships and spurred innovation for some of the most prominent brands in the high-tech industry.
